name: MUTANT STRANGLER VINES
text: No Structures can be built until 2 Resources plus 1 Resource per Land are discarded. The vines get out of hand overnight.

name: MAINTENANCE
text: Randomize 1 Structure plus 1 per Land. For each: EITHER Spend 1 Resource to maintain OR Structure gains 1 Structural Damage (cannot repair this Settlement Use).

name: RESOURCE THEFT
text: Lose 1 Resource per Land. CONSEQUENCE: If a Turret has been built since last effect, discard card; otherwise resolve again + add CONSEQUENCE.

name: INFESTATION
text: Until 2 Resources per Land are discarded, no Structures can be repaired and tokens cannot be removed during Settlement use or Battle Set-up.

name: RAIDER ULTIMATUM
text: EITHER Discard 2 items and add CONSEQUENCE. OR Resolve Settlement Attack Rating 4+1 per Land minus defense. CONSEQUENCE: Resolve again + add CONSEQUENCE.

name: BREWING TROUBLE
text: Attack Rating 1 plus 3 per Land. Defender is always aware. Morning scouts noticed advance enemy camps.

name: PILLAGE LIFE
text: Attack Rating 9. For 1st and every other Structural Damage discard 1 random item instead (if not using scenario). Scenario: Victory Condition: Pillage.

name: HOSTILE TAKEOVER
text: Attack Rating 6. Watch Towers have no Defense value. Defender is always unaware. Scenario: Deployment: Surprise.

name: FIRE STARTERS
text: Attack Rating 5+1 per Land. Scenario: Deployment: Distraction.

name: POWER STRUGGLE
text: Attack Rating 3+1 per Land. Target Infrastructure Structures. Scenario: Victory Condition: Sabotage | Deployment: Sewers.

name: THE LONG GAME
text: Attack Rating 8. Target Small Structures. Scenario: Victory Condition: Disable.

name: TRADE WAR
text: Attack Rating 7. Target Item Structures. Scenario: Victory Condition: Shutdown.

name: GREASE THE WHEELS
text: EITHER Discard 2 items OR increase the next Attack Rating by 1.

name: NO SHORTAGE OF TROUBLE
text: Attack Rating 6. Target Stores, Maintenance Sheds and Lockers. Scenario: Victory Condition: Disrupt.

name: SELF DEFENSE
text: Attack Rating 5+2 per Land. Target Defense Structures. Scenario: Victory Condition: Weaken.

name: SCRAP PILES
text: EITHER Keep scrap: +1 Attack Rating (+1 per Land) and gain 3 Resources after attack. OR Clear now: Discard 2 Resources, -1 next Attack Rating.

name: FIRE!
text: Allocate 1 Structural Damage to random Structure, then 3 more to Structures within Red of first one.

name: STORM WINDS
text: Allocate 3 Structural Damage to different Structures. Prioritize Badly Damaged, then Damaged, then Undamaged. Reinforced structures immune.

name: OUTAGES
text: Randomize 1 Structure per Land from power/water providers. They provide nothing until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Weather stabilises, effect ends.

name: SUBSIDENCE
text: Randomly select 1 Structure. CONSEQUENCE: If not currently Reinforced, it suffers 2 Structural Damage.

name: MINOR QUAKE
text: Allocate 1 Structural Damage +1 per Land to EACH different Structure. Reinforced Structures immune.

name: BUSH FIRE
text: No Explore cards can be drawn until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Fire burns out, effect ends.

name: VACATION
text: Randomize 2 Item Structures. These cannot be used for the remainder of this Settlement use.

name: HUNGRY HUNGRY CRICKETS
text: Draw 2 fewer Food & Drink cards from Cooking Stations until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Crops recuperate, effect ends.

name: MONGREL PACK
text: EITHER Add 1 Stun to model during next Battle Set-up and add CONSEQUENCE. OR Discard 2 Food & Drink items. CONSEQUENCE: Resolve again + add CONSEQUENCE.

name: SLIM PICKINGS
text: All Item structures draw 1 fewer card than normal until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Attacks ease, effect ends.

name: RESOURCE CONTAMINATION
text: Structures that give Resources give 1 fewer Resource until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Quality restored, effect ends.

name: CAUSTIC MIST
text: For 5 random items in pool: EITHER Spend 1 Resource to restore immediately OR item cannot be equipped for next battle (50% value if sold).

name: INQUISITIVE DEATHCLAW
text: EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE: Deathclaw tracks back to Settlement. Driven off but causes 2 Structural Damage and 1 Stun Token to 1 model next Battle Set-up.

name: TAKEN IN THE NIGHT
text: Set aside 3 random items from pool (unavailable). EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE: Items found, effect ends.

name: HOUSE CLEARANCE
text: Gain 5 Resources.

name: ACCIDENT AT WORK
text: Current Leader gains 1 Stun Token every Battle Set-up until CONSEQUENCE. EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE: Doctor returns to heal Leader, effect ends.

name: BLOODWORM FEVER
text: Allocate 1 Damage to 3 different models every Battle Set-up until CONSEQUENCE. EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE: Cure found, effect ends.

name: HIGH QUALITY JUNK
text: Gain 1 extra Resource each time a Structure gives Resources until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Quality junk runs out, effect ends.

name: TOUGH FACADE
text: During remainder of Settlement use, up to 3 Structures can be Reinforced at cost of 1 Resource each.

name: WHISTLE BLOWER
text: Discard any number of items. Reduce next Attack Rating by 1 for each item discarded.

name: GENEROSITY
text: When the next Structure that gives an item is used, draw 1 extra item AND keep 1 extra item.

name: LIGHT DAMAGE
text: During remainder of Settlement use, up to 4 Structures can be repaired costing 1 fewer Resource than usual.

name: TEAM EFFORT
text: EITHER Any 1 Structure made Undamaged regardless of current state (even if Wrecked). OR Repair up to 3 different Structures once each.

name: BOUNTIFUL HAULS
text: Draw 1 additional item when using Item Structures until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Glut ends, effect ends.

name: READING FOR PLEASURE
text: When the next Structure that gives a Boost is used, draw and keep 2 extra Boosts.

name: THE INSIDE TRACK
text: Next time an Explore card is drawn, draw 1 extra Explore card and choose which to resolve. Place other on top or bottom of Explore Deck.

name: FORGOTTEN DEFENSES
text: Pay 1 Resource to add CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Gain 1 Machinegun Mk I Turret.

name: FAVORS REPAID
text: All costs to use a Structure decreased by 50% (round up) until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Favors repaid, effect ends.

name: SCOUT GROUP
text: Temporarily gain 1 Ranger Outpost and 1 Scout Camp until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: EITHER pay 1 Food & Drink + 1 other item to extend OR group moves on.

name: ABUNDANT SUPPLIES
text: Barracks and Medical Centers remove double their usual amount of conditions/damage until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Supplies return to normal.

name: MISSING TRADER
text: Randomize 1 Item Structure (Jervis's) which cannot be used until EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE. EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE: Jervis found. Next 3 uses of his Structure: draw+keep 1 extra card.

name: INCOMING!
text: For each Item discarded (or Structure used) which heals at least 1 Regular Damage, gain 30 Caps. Can do this 5 times until next Settlement Event.

name: FRESH FINDS
text: Gain 1 Weapon item and 1 Junk item.

name: WARNING SIGNAL
text: Discard Resources to build signal fire. CONSEQUENCE: Roll Red Die. If <= Resources discarded, signal warns neighbor — gain 3 items as gift.

name: KEEN TO LEARN
text: Immediately gain 1 Perk for free.

name: DIFFICULT SHORTAGES
text: For remainder of this Settlement Use: one item type value doubled, only draw 1 card of that type from Item Structures. Roll Red Die: Star=Junk, Half=Chems, Star+Half=Gear.

name: SUPPLY ISSUES
text: For remainder of this Settlement Use: one item type value doubled, only draw 1 card of that type. Roll Red Die: Star=Food & Drink, Half=Clothing, Star+Half=Armor.

name: LOST TRADE
text: Trader is several days late. Keep a lookout. EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE: Trader found alive (Brahmin dead). Gain 1 Item Structure OR upgrade 1 existing Item Structure (draws 1 more card).

name: FOLLOW THE LEADER
text: Discard 1 item. All Item Structures draw 1 more card than normal until end of this Settlement Use.

name: A CALL FOR HELP
text: The dog indicates someone needs help. EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE: Gain 1 Crafting Structure.

name: A CURIOUS MAP
text: EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE: Cache found. Gain 30 Caps, 1 Weapon and 2 other items.

name: CELEBRATION
text: Discard 1 Alcohol item. During Set-up for next Battle: remove up to 3 tokens from a model and add 1 Armor Boost.

name: FARMED OUT
text: Roll Red Die: Star=Gain 1 item + 75 Caps. Half=Gain 1 Stun + 1 Damage + 2 items. Star+Half=Next Attack Rating +2.

name: HOME FROM HOME
text: Mark any usable unused Structures as used without their effect. Gain 25 Caps each. Infrastructure excluded. Max 200 Caps.

name: EASTFIELD STEELWORKS
text: Gain 2 Resources. SETTLEMENT EVENT CONSEQUENCE: Scrap owners want it back. Lose 4 Resources.

name: RELAY TOWER 2SW-314
text: Gain 2 Resources.

name: TAFFINGTON BOATHOUSE
text: EITHER Easy pickings: Gain 2 Resources. OR Go inside: Roll Red Die, gain that many Resources plus 1 Chem item.

name: HILLSIDE DRIVE-THRU
text: Gain 1 additional Resource when Resources are gained from Structures until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Landslide crashes, effect ends.

name: EAGLE STAR DINER
text: Discard up to 3 items. Next time you gain Resources from a Structure, gain additional Resources = 1 + number of items discarded.

name: RICKETY SHACK
text: Discard up to 3 items. Next Resources from Structure: roll Red Die. If <= items discarded, gain additional 4 Resources.

name: SUNNY PEAK CAMPSITE
text: Spend 3 or 6 Resources to add CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: 3 Resources=remove 1 token next Set-up. 6 Resources=remove 3 tokens next Set-up.

name: BROKEN HORSE FARM
text: Discard up to 3 non-Junk items and gain 2 Resources for each.

name: BRAMBLE COTTAGE
text: Draw 3 Food/Clothing items. Gain any mix by spending 2 Resources each.

name: LURTON CREEK
text: EITHER Leave: Lose 2 Resources. OR Challenge (Test CHA): Success=draw 2 weapon items. Fail=lose 4 Resources.

name: LOGGING CAMP
text: Gain 2 Armor items. SETTLEMENT EVENT CONSEQUENCE: -3 Power / -3 Water until end of this Settlement use.

name: NORTH PUMPHOUSE
text: Discard any Weapon/Food/Junk/Chem item. Select up to 2 Structures providing power/water and permanently +1 their output each.

name: LONELY CABIN
text: Gain 0-4 Resources. If you gain 1+, add CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Attack Rating 3+1 per Resource gained. Scenario: Victory Condition: Vandalise.

name: REGAL CLINIC
text: Remove 1 generator from Settlement to add CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Remove 3 tokens during next Set-up.

name: UNATTENDED CAMP
text: Draw 0-3 items. If 1+ drawn, add CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Roll Red Die per item drawn. Attack Rating = total rolls. Scenario: Victory Condition: Pillage.

name: RAIL STATION
text: Draw up to 3 Items one at a time. For each Item drawn, increase next Attack Rating by number drawn so far.

name: EVERSON BRIDGE
text: EITHER Pay: Discard 1 item. OR Refuse: Increase next Attack Rating by 2.

name: LANG FARMSTEAD
text: Choose 1-4 hours. Roll Red Die. If <= hours, +3 next Attack Rating. Roll again; if <= hours, draw 1 Junk item.

name: WITHERED FOREST
text: Test PER: Success=Draw 1 Weapon + 2 Junk + 1 Armor. Fail=Apply 1 Structural Damage, repeat card (max 5 times).

name: SWOLLEN RIVER
text: If you open gates: draw 3 Food/Chem items, then roll Red Die and apply Structural Damage = result minus 1.

name: BLACKHORN CAMP
text: Test CHA: Success=Reduce next Attack Rating by 2. Fail=Increase next Attack Rating by 1.

name: CLEARVIEW PARK
text: Test STR: Success=1 model starts next Battle with Stun Token, then Repair 4 times. Fail=As success but Repair once only.

name: CABIN ON THE HILL
text: EITHER Search cabin: Draw 3 Food/Junk, roll Red Die, apply that Structural Damage. OR Return to help: Roll Red Die, apply Structural Damage = result minus 2.

name: PIVERTON QUARRY
text: Clear Mole Rats: Roll Red Die. For each Star, gain 1 Resource, then Repair 2 times.

name: BROKEN OVERPASS
text: EITHER Help: Gain Stun + Test AGI (success=1 Item Structure draws 3 from now on). OR Leave: Remove 1 Item Structure from Settlement.

name: HOME FIXIT
text: EITHER Read books: Repairs cost 1 fewer Resource this Settlement use. OR Search (Test PER-2): Success=Gain 1 Weapon + 1 Junk.

name: BARKSIDE RANCH
text: For every 2 Item Structures you mark as used without their benefit, return 1 non-Wrecked Structure to Undamaged.

name: DARK FARMHOUSE
text: Agree: Gain 80 Caps but 1 generator outputs zero power for you until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Batteries charged, effect ends.

name: MOTO FITTER
text: Gain 4 barricades (optional). If you do, Test AGI: Success=Gain 1 Resource. Fail=Gain 1 Resource + 1 Stun Token.

name: DEER LAKE CAMP
text: EITHER Mark Medical Centre as used (gain 3 other items instead). OR Drive off Sentry Bot: Gain 1 Stun + 30 Caps.

name: HUNGRY MONGRELS
text: EITHER Ignore: 1 model starts next battle with Stun Token + add EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE. OR Pay (discard 1 Food): Discard this card. CONSEQUENCE: Resolve again.

name: FREEWAY ROBBERY
text: EITHER Run: Gain 1 Stun + add EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE. OR Pay (discard 1 item): Discard card. CONSEQUENCE: Resolve again.

name: PASSING TRADE
text: EITHER Pass: Discard. OR Trade: Discard 2 items, name 1 item type (not Chems), draw 3 of that type, keep 1. Add EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Resolve again.

name: DRY LAKEBED
text: EITHER Avoid it: Add EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE. OR Discourage it (Test STR): Success=Gain 1 Resource. CONSEQUENCE: Gain 1 Stun Token, then resolve again.

name: REMOTE CAMP SITE
text: Roll Red Die. If any Star: draw 3 Food/Junk items. Otherwise add CONSEQUENCE or discard. CONSEQUENCE: Gain 1 Stun, then resolve again.

name: SCAVENGER HUNT
text: Roll Red Die. If any Star: draw 1 Power Armor item. Otherwise add CONSEQUENCE or discard. CONSEQUENCE: Gain 1 Stun, then resolve again.

name: ABBERWORTH SALOON
text: Draw 3 items. If you keep them, add EXPLORE CONSEQUENCE (no items from Explore cards until resolved). CONSEQUENCE: Merc accepts loot, effect ends.

name: LEAVESTON CAVE
text: Resolve 1 Radiation Damage then roll Red Die. If any Star: draw 3 weapon items. Otherwise add CONSEQUENCE or discard. CONSEQUENCE: Resolve again.

name: GUNNER CACHE
text: EITHER Try again later: Add CONSEQUENCE. OR Give up: Discard, draw new Explore card. CONSEQUENCE: Test PER: Success=Draw 2 Weapon items. Fail=Add CONSEQUENCE again.

name: WATER TOWER
text: Pay 30 Caps to add CONSEQUENCE. If items are gained from Explore cards, also draw 1 Junk item until CONSEQUENCE. CONSEQUENCE: Scribe leaves, effect ends.
